knowledge_base.question: How do I book a train ticket?
knowledge_base.answer: Go to the Schedules page, find your desired train, and click Book Now. Then choose Seat or Berth, pick your spot from the seat map, and complete payment. You have 1 hour to pay (or 15 minutes if departure is within the hour).

knowledge_base.question: How long do I have to pay after booking?
knowledge_base.answer: You have 1 hour to complete payment after creating a booking. If the train departs within 1 hour, you only have 15 minutes. Unpaid bookings are automatically cancelled after expiry and the seat is released.

knowledge_base.question: What payment methods are accepted?
knowledge_base.answer: Payment is made by card through the secure payment page. After booking, you are redirected to complete payment within the time window.

knowledge_base.question: How do I cancel a booking?
knowledge_base.answer: Go to My Bookings. For unpaid (Pending) bookings, click Cancel Booking — no charge. For paid (Confirmed) bookings, click Request Refund. Admin reviews refund requests and processes them.

knowledge_base.question: What is the refund policy?
knowledge_base.answer: User-requested refunds: 30% cancellation fee is deducted, so you receive 70% of your payment back. Admin-cancelled bookings: 100% full refund with no deduction. Refunds are processed after admin approval.

knowledge_base.question: How long does a refund take?
knowledge_base.answer: After admin approves your refund request, processing typically takes a few business days depending on your bank. You can track your refund status in My Bookings.

knowledge_base.question: How do loyalty points work?
knowledge_base.answer: You earn 10 loyalty points for every 100 PKR spent on confirmed bookings. Points are lost if a booking is cancelled. Check your points in the Loyalty section of your dashboard.

knowledge_base.question: What are the loyalty tiers?
knowledge_base.answer: Bronze: 0–499 points. Silver: 500–1,999 points. Gold: 2,000–4,999 points. Platinum: 5,000+ points. Higher tiers unlock better perks and discounts.

knowledge_base.question: What is the difference between a Seat and a Berth?
knowledge_base.answer: A Seat is a regular chair — cheaper and good for daytime journeys. A Berth is a sleeping bed — more expensive but ideal for overnight travel. You choose your preference when booking.

knowledge_base.question: How many coaches does a train have and what is the layout?
knowledge_base.answer: Each schedule has a configurable number of Sleeper and Seater coaches. Sleeper coach: 5 compartments, each with 6 berths + 2 seats = 30 berths + 10 seats per coach. Seater coach: 5 compartments, each with 6 seats + 2 berths = 30 seats + 10 berths per coach.

knowledge_base.question: How do I choose my seat or berth?
knowledge_base.answer: After selecting a train and booking type (Seat or Berth), an interactive seat map shows available and booked spots. Click any green spot to select it. Blue means selected, grey means already booked.

knowledge_base.question: Can I change my seat after booking?
knowledge_base.answer: Seat changes after booking are handled by admin. Contact support through the Messages section in your dashboard, and an admin will update your seat assignment if possible.

knowledge_base.question: Which cities and stations are available?
knowledge_base.answer: We serve major cities across the country through the National Railway System: Lahore, Karachi, Rawalpindi, Islamabad, Multan, Faisalabad, Peshawar, and Quetta. More routes are being added regularly.

knowledge_base.question: How do I view my booking history?
knowledge_base.answer: Go to My Bookings in your dashboard. You can see all bookings with their status: Pending (awaiting payment), Confirmed (paid), Completed (journey done), or Cancelled.

knowledge_base.question: What happens if I miss my train?
knowledge_base.answer: Contact support immediately through the Messages section. Missed train situations are handled case-by-case. We recommend arriving at least 30 minutes before departure.

knowledge_base.question: How do I contact support?
knowledge_base.answer: Use the Contact page for general enquiries, or go to Messages in your dashboard for account-specific issues. Admin replies within 24 hours. You can also send a follow-up message after receiving a reply.

knowledge_base.question: How do I register or create an account?
knowledge_base.answer: Click Sign Up and fill in your name, email, phone, and password. You will be logged in automatically after registration. A loyalty account is created for you as well.

knowledge_base.question: I forgot my password, what should I do?
knowledge_base.answer: Contact support through the Contact page with your registered email. Admin can assist with account recovery.

knowledge_base.question: What does Pending booking status mean?
knowledge_base.answer: Pending means your booking is created but payment has not been completed yet. You must pay within the time window shown, otherwise the booking is automatically cancelled.

knowledge_base.question: What does Confirmed booking status mean?
knowledge_base.answer: Confirmed means your payment was successful and your seat or berth is reserved. You will find your booking details in My Bookings.

knowledge_base.question: How does admin cancellation work?
knowledge_base.answer: If admin cancels your booking for any reason (e.g., schedule change), you automatically receive a 100% full refund. No cancellation fee is applied. Loyalty points earned from that booking are also reversed.

knowledge_base.question: Can I book for someone else?
knowledge_base.answer: Bookings are tied to your account, but you can book a seat and arrange for someone else to travel. Contact support if you need assistance with this.

knowledge_base.question: What are the ticket prices?
knowledge_base.answer: Seat and berth prices are set by the admin per train. You can see the exact prices on the Schedules page before booking. Berths are generally more expensive than seats.
